expectations.text: Checks which account is mapped to the project directory
expectations.evidence: Step 1-2 reads config.json and checks if /home/user/Projects/ClientApp has a mapping

expectations.text: Verifies identity with railway whoami or similar
expectations.evidence: Step 3 runs RAILWAY_TOKEN=<token> railway whoami for each account

expectations.text: Shows how to fix the mapping or switch to correct account
expectations.evidence: Step 4 has Option A (update mapping) and Option B (add new account + token)
Step 7 deploys with RAILWAY_TOKEN=<correct-token> railway up
Step 6 verifies with railway status before deploying, Step 7 mentions streaming logs
